channel.title: Influential Albums on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Influential Albums on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Most Influential Albums of the Last Decade
item.description: The albums from 2015-2025 that changed music forever. From genre-bending masterpieces to cultural phenomena, these records shaped the sound of a generation.
